name: DISC Producer's Loans

eligibility.description: The loan must be designated as a producer's loan, have a maturity of 5 years or less, and the borrower must be engaged in U.S. manufacturing of export property.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: A DISC can lend its accumulated tax-deferred income back to the U.S. manufacturing parent (the borrower) to fund export-related assets, R&D, and inventory without triggering a deemed distribution.
